records.question: Which companies named Petrobras have exactly 313.2 billion in assets and profits of at most 21.2 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE companies.name = 'Petrobras' AND companies.assets_billion = 313.2 AND companies.profits_billion <= 21.2
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 WHERE T1.name = 'Petrobras' AND T1.Assets_billion = 313.2 AND T1.Profits_billion <= 21.2 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Office_locations AS T2 WHERE T1.id = T2.company_id)

records.question: Which companies headquartered in the USA have at least 184.8 billion in assets but no more than 189.6 billion in sales and no more than 19.0 billion in profits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.assets_billion >= 184.8 AND companies.sales_billion <= 189.6 AND companies.profits_billion <= 19.0 AND companies.headquarters = 'USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Companies WHERE Assets_billion >= 184.8 AND Sales_billion <= 189.6 AND Profits_billion <= 19.0 AND Headquarters = 'USA'

records.question: Which companies in the Banking industry have their headquarters in France, are named BNP Paribas, and have a market value of 88 billion, assets of 2680.7 billion, sales of 130.4 billion, and profits of 10.5 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE companies.headquarters = 'France' AND companies.name = 'BNP Paribas' AND companies.market_value_billion = '88' AND companies.assets_billion = 2680.7 AND companies.sales_billion = 130.4 AND companies.profits_billion = 10.5 AND companies.industry = 'Banking'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.Headquarters = 'France' AND T1.name = 'BNP Paribas' AND T1.Market_Value_billion = '88' AND T1.Assets_billion = 2680.7 AND T1.Sales_billion = 130.4 AND T1.Profits_billion = 10.5 AND T1.Industry = 'Banking'

records.question: What companies in the Banking industry headquartered in China have market value exactly 224.8 billion, assets at most 1408.0 billion, profits at least 15.6 billion, and sales no more than 58.2 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.assets_billion <= 1408.0 AND companies.market_value_billion = '224.8' AND companies.profits_billion >= 15.6 AND companies.sales_billion <= 58.2 AND companies.industry = 'Banking' AND companies.headquarters = 'China'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Companies WHERE Assets_billion <= 1408.0 AND Market_Value_billion = '224.8' AND Profits_billion >= 15.6 AND Sales_billion <= 58.2 AND Industry = 'Banking' AND Headquarters = 'China'

records.question: Which companies have office locations in buildings where the status is under construction?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.status = 'under construction'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN buildings AS T3 ON T2.building_id = T3.id WHERE T3.Status = 'under construction'

records.gold_sql:

WHERE companies.market_value_billion = '320.8'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Companies WHERE Market_Value_billion = '320.8'

records.question: Which companies named Petrobras, headquartered in Brazil with profits exactly 21.2 billion and sales of at least 121.3 billion, have offices that moved in 2031 or later in 44-story, 200-meter buildings located in Mexico City?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.city = 'Mexico City' AND companies.profits_billion = 21.2 AND office_locations.move_in_year >= 2031 AND companies.headquarters = 'Brazil' AND companies.name = 'Petrobras' AND buildings.stories = 44 AND buildings.height = 200 AND companies.sales_billion >= 121.3
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN buildings AS T3 ON T2.building_id = T3.id WHERE T1.Profits_billion = 21.2 AND T1.Headquarters = 'Brazil' AND T1.name = 'Petrobras' AND T1.Sales_billion >= 121.3 AND T2.move_in_year >= 2031 AND T3.City = 'Mexico City' AND T3.Stories = 44 AND T3.Height = 200

records.question: Which companies named BNP Paribas have a market value of 88 billion, assets of at least 2680.7 billion, profits of at most 10.5 billion, and are located in buildings where the status is proposed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.status = 'proposed' AND companies.assets_billion >= 2680.7 AND companies.profits_billion <= 10.5 AND companies.market_value_billion = '88' AND companies.name = 'BNP Paribas'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN buildings AS T3 ON T2.building_id = T3.id WHERE T1.Assets_billion >= 2680.7 AND T1.Profits_billion <= 10.5 AND T1.Market_Value_billion = '88' AND T1.name = 'BNP Paribas' AND T3.Status = 'proposed'
